title: Focused Reading App for iOS, Mac, and AppleTV
first_prompt: I want you to ask me about my idea for this app, to get clarity on it so you can create a complete technical specification and work plan. The goal is to build this as an app for iOS and Mac that then
summary: The conversation centered on defining the technical specifications and development roadmap for a cross-platform reading application designed to ingest physical books and digital files (ePubs/PDFs) for display on AppleTV. The discussion refined the input process, moving from general text extraction to specific requirements like using the Vision framework for OCR region selection and storing final content in Markdown format. Ultimately, the conversation concluded with the assistant proposing a detailed architecture utilizing AWS services (Lambda, S3, DynamoDB) and specifying minimum device requirements of iOS 15+ and macOS 12+.
